chapter_question: How can Act V exercises become a forms-and-curvature laboratory?
inspection_targets: Exercise clusters become covector, tensor, wedge, d, and Stokes checks.
A delta-like covector approximates measurement against a vector.
Contraction removes matched slots and preserves invariant meaning.
Dimension controls which wedge products can survive.
The exercise lab separates local and global exactness.
Cartan-style frame checks close the course.

source_span.focus: Practice set on forms, tensors, exterior calculus, integration theorems, cohomology, and Cartan's geometric machinery.
source_span.label: Chapter 39
source_span.title: Exercises for Act V
topics: Tensor product, contraction, and metric-duality problems
Moving frames, curvature forms, and Schwarzschild exercises
